fixes.description: Downgraded @types/react from ^19.2.14 to ^18.2.0 and @types/react-dom from ^19.2.3 to ^18.2.0 to match React 18 runtime
Fixed nginx.conf copy path from /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf to /etc/nginx/nginx.conf and EXPOSE from 3000 to 80
Replaced deprecated npm ci --only=production with --omit=dev (npm 7+ compatible)
Changed upstream frontend from port 3000 to 80 (matching prod container). Added /face-ai/ proxy locations to both HTTP and HTTPS server blocks.
Fixed DB_HOST from attendance-db-prod to postgres. Replaced hardcoded insecure JWT secrets with env var references.
Added config.env pattern to prevent committing config files with secrets
Fixed frontend port mapping from 3000:3000 to 3000:80 to match container serve port
Removed unused fastapi and uvicorn — app.py uses Flask, not FastAPI
Created Secret and ConfigMap manifest templates referenced by other K8s manifests
Fixed Redis probe from inline $(REDIS_PASSWORD) to shell-based env var expansion
Converted manualChunks from object form (Rollup) to function form (Rolldown/Vite 8 compatible)
Removed deprecated minify: 'esbuild' — Vite 8 uses OXC/Rolldown by default
